revision.text:
[[ja:荒木神社 (伊豆の国市)]] {{Expand Japanese|荒木神社 (伊豆の国市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Araki Shrine (Izunokuni) | native_name = 荒木神社 | image = Araki Jinja (Izunokuni).JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Araki Shrine (Izunokuni) | coordinates = {{coord|35.059761|138.941703}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | established = {'time': '+0927-00-00T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 9, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985786'} }} {{nihongo|'''Araki Shrine (Izunokuni)'''|荒木神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11380552|ltq=Q11380552|qid=Q11380552|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}} ** Series ordinal: 44 ** P155: {{ill|Q135039667|ltq=Q135039667|qid=Q135039667|1=Kamono Shrine (Q135039667)}} ** P156: {{ill|Fumunashino Shrine|lt=Fumunashino Shrine|qid=Q135039668|1=Fumunashino Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q863758|ltq=Q863758|qid=Q863758|1=Izunokuni}}https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html * {{ill|Q860928|ltq=Q860928|qid=Q860928|1=Izu Province}} * {{ill|Tagata District, Shizuoka|lt=Tagata district|en|Tagata District, Shizuoka|fr|District de Tagata|id|Distrik Tagata, Shizuoka|it|Distretto di Tagata|ja|田方郡|ko|다가타군|pl|Powiat Tagata|uk|Повіт Таґата|zh|田方郡|qid=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.059761|138.941703}} == inception (P571) == * {'time': '+0927-00-00T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 9, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985786'} == image (P18) == * Araki Jinja (Izunokuni).JPG == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181612 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == legal form (P1454) == * {{ill|religious corporation|lt=religious corporation|ja|宗教法人|qid=Q7311343|1=religious corporation}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == postal code (P281) == * 410-2124https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7080105001895https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県伊豆の国市原木90-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:荒木神社 (伊豆の国市)]] {{wikidata link|Q117138364}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Araki Shrine |Image = [[File:Araki Jinja (Izunokuni).JPG|270px]]
Torii gate and worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|coord={{coord|35|3|34.9|N|138|56|30|E}}}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Izunokuni City|Q863758|qid=Q863758|1=Izunokuni}} Haraki 90-1 |Coordinates = {{Coord|35|3|34.9|N|138|56|30|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsuhikone-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|lt=List of Shikinai shrines in Izu Province#Shikinai shrines|Q11380552|qid=Q11380552|lt=Shikinai shrine|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |Founded = |Main hall = {{ill|lt=Gongen-zukuri|Q3155268|qid=Q3155268|1=Ishi-no-ma-zukuri}} |Alternate name = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festival = Sunday closest to October 18 |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Araki Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|35|3|34.9|N|138|56|30|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Araki Shrine''' (あらきじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Haraki (Baraki), {{ill|lt=Izunokuni City|Q863758|qid=Q863758|1=Izunokuni}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402096 Araki Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. It is one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|Q11380552|qid=Q11380552|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}}[https://www.city.izunokuni.shizuoka.jp/tosikei/documents/2-7nirayama-oohito.pdf Historical landscape seen in shrine festivals and Sanbasō of the Nirayama and Ōhito areas] - Izunokuni City, Urban Planning Division. === Overview === It is enshrined to the east of the “Haraki Intersection” on {{ill|lt=National Route 136|Q11421406|qid=Q11421406|1=Japan National Route 136}}. Although the date of foundation is unknown, as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinai shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}, it dates back to before {{ill|lt=Enchō (era)|Q1327274|qid=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}} 5 ({{ill|lt=927|Q30470|qid=Q30470|1=927}}), when the ‘{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}’ was compiled[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 What is the Jinmyōchō?] - {{ill|lt=Kotobank|Q11302260|qid=Q11302260|1=Kotobank}}. In the ‘{{ill|lt=Izu Province Shinkaichō|Q17193087|qid=Q17193087|1=Izu Province Shinkaichō}}’, it is recorded as “Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Araki no Myōjin.” Before the Edo period, it was also called Ibaraki Shrine (Ibaraki Jinja), and given that there was an old place name Tagata District Ibaraki Township, the shrine/place names “Araki” and “Haraki” are thought to be phonetic corruptions of “Ibaraki”On-site shrine history plaque. In addition, due to a legend that {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|Q242800|qid=Q242800|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} frequently visited the shrine during his time in exile and hung his horse’s saddle on a tree in front of the torii gate, it was also known as Kurakake Shrine (Kurakake Myōjin). In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 12 ({{ill|lt=1879|Q7783|qid=Q7783|1=1879}}), it was designated a gōsha, and on April 12 of Meiji 40 ({{ill|lt=1907|Q2048|qid=Q2048|1=1907}}), it was designated a shrine authorized to receive offerings of sacred food and heihaku. At the grand festival in October, as with other shrines in the city, the {{ill|lt=Sanbasō|Q11356796|qid=Q11356796|1=Sanbasō}} dance is performed. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsuhikone-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Precincts === * Sacred giant camphor tree ; Sub-shrines * {{ill|lt=Kifune Shrine|Q276779|qid=Q276779|1=Kifune Shrine}}, among others === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402096 Araki Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Araki Shrine (Izunokuni)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Araki Shrine (Izunokuni)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Araki Shrine (Izunokuni)]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Izunokuni]] [[Category:伊豆の国市の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Izunokuni]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]]
